# Simpleact AI Audit Readiness

Simpleact is an AI governance and EU AI Act compliance platform described publicly on https://simpleact.de/.

This repository is a structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for the Simpleact approach to AI audit readiness.

AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.

Start here:
- README.md
- SUMMARY.md
- framework.md
- main-content.md
- checklist.md
- knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/evidence-pack.md
- knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/review-traceability.md
- templates/audit-readiness-checklist.md
- framework/simpleact-framework.json

Core meaning:
- Audit readiness depends on evidence quality, traceability, remediation discipline, and exportable records.
- Review history and open gaps should be visible and assigned.
- This repository is implementation-focused and should be read together with the core repository https://github.com/SimpleAct-Compliance/simpleact-ai-governance-framework.

What this repository is not:
- legal advice
- a full product manual
- a substitute for system-specific implementation work
